task.goal: Seed 5 archived completed projects and require SDG tags/category with dropdown options during project creation.

discoveredConstraints: Project module has mirrored -PatPat files that may require synchronized edits.
Shared package already exports SDG constants via shared/index.js.
Seeder already creates archived projects with projectStatus=archived and isArchived=true.
likelyChangeAreas: Add/confirm required project fields for SDG tags and category in schema + Zod validation.
Add dropdown-based inputs in Create Project UI and include payload mapping.
If needed, enforce backend service checks for category/SDG presence.
Confirm seeder remains exactly 5 archived completed projects (already true) or adjust if a separate seed path is intended.

assumptions: The required archived seed target is the main seeder at server/seeders/index.js.
"category" refers to project category/domain captured at project creation time.
SDG tags and category must be required at both UI and API validation layers.
No database migration script is required beyond schema-compatible updates.
missingInfo: Authoritative dropdown list for project category values is not yet defined.
Expected SDG storage format is not specified (e.g., string tags vs numeric IDs).
Unclear whether -PatPat mirrored files must be updated in lockstep for this task.
Unclear whether archived seeding must also be added to any test-specific seeders besides server/seeders/index.js.
